zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth DeGournai於1242年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親John DeGournai3歲，母親Lady Olivia Lovel28歲。她於1237年與Lord William Adam III在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1309年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 亞當享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth DeGournai was born in 1242, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John DeGournai, was 3 and her mother, Lady Olivia Lovel, was 28. She married Lord William Adam III in 1237, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1309, in Charlton Adam, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth DeGournai est née en 1242, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John DeGournai, avait 3 ans et sa mère, Lady Olivia Lovel, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William Adam III en 1237, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1309, à Charlton Adam, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth DeGournaiが1242年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John DeGournaiは3歳，母Lady Olivia Lovelは28歳であった。1237年にイギリスランカシュアイアでLord William Adam IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1309年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン アダムで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth DeGournai(이)가 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John DeGournai(은)는 3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Olivia Lovel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1237년 영국 랭카실르에서 Lord William Adam III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 애다에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth DeGournai nasceu em 1242, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John DeGournai, tinha 3 anos e sua mãe, Lady Olivia Lovel, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord William Adam III em 1237, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1309, em Charlton Adam, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth DeGournai родилась в 1242 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John DeGournai было 3 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Olivia Lovel, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William Adam III в 1237 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1309 г. в местности чарлтон адам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
